nasb.text: For it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich man to enter the kingdom of God.”

esv.text: For it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to enter the kingdom of God.”

cnv.text: 駱駝穿過針眼，比有錢的人進　神的國還容易呢。”

ccb.text: 骆驼穿过针眼比有钱人进上帝的国还容易呢！”

csbs.text: 骆驼穿过针眼，比富有的人进入神的国更容易呢！”
